query: Yes, please go ahead and make the change and issue the refund to my gift card. Thank you!

user: The user provides Aarav Anderson and ZIP 19031.

assistant: The assistant tells the user that the cheapest Desk Lamp is item 5320792178 at $135.24 and that changing from the current lamp would yield a $17.99 refund to the gift card if approved.
user: The user approves making the change and issuing the refund to the gift card.

candidate_answers.text: Perfect — I have your approval and the replacement item identified, so I can update the order and issue the gift-card refund now.
The order has already been verified and the replacement variant is already surfaced, so the grounded next action is to modify the pending order item rather than repeat lookup steps.
